posts.name: Gjembi
posts.cooked: Njerez ishin dhe ata te 3 apo jo?

A small step for a man a giant leap for the mankind.
NASA u kishte dhene 20% probability qe do te ktheheshin gjalle.
Nixon kishte pregatitur dhe fjalimin qe do mbante per ate rast.
Fate has ordained that the men who went to the moon to explore in peace will stay on the moon to rest in peace.

These brave men, Neil Armstrong and Edwin Aldrin, know that there is no hope for their recovery. But they also know that there is hope for mankind in their sacrifice.

These two men are laying down their lives in mankind’s most noble goal: the search for truth and understanding.

They will be mourned by their families and friends; they will be mourned by their nation; they will be mourned by the people of the world; they will be mourned by a Mother Earth that dared send two of her sons into the unknown.

In their exploration, they stirred the people of the world to feel as one; in their sacrifice, they bind more tightly the brotherhood of man.

In ancient days, men looked at stars and saw their heroes in the constellations. In modern times, we do much the same, but our heroes are epic men of flesh and blood.

Others will follow, and surely find their way home. Man’s search will not be denied. But these men were the first, and they will remain the foremost in our hearts.

For every human being who looks up at the moon in the nights to come will know that there is some corner of another world that is forever mankind.

Jalopnik

Read Nixon's Never-Delivered Speech in the Event the Moon Landing Failed

It’s been 50 years since American astronauts landed on the moon, and it remains one of the single greatest achievements of modern human history. The moon, as it turns out, is really, really difficult to get to, and the fact that we pulled it off at...

Vox – 7 Jun 19

Trump’s confusing tweet about "Mars (of which the moon is a part)," explained

NASA is working on a hasty 2024 moon mission. Trump now says the moon is so 50 years ago.

posts.name: varianti kohor
posts.cooked: Ata ishin edhe mamale, jo vetem njerez, atëherë le te themi qe eshte nje arritje e madhe e mamaleve

posts.name: Pjer Thomas
posts.cooked:
varik:

ta ishin edhe mamale, jo vetem njerez, atëherë le te themi qe eshte nje arritje e madhe e mamaleve

variko, çfar eshte kjo; mamale ?
mamale eshte çfare mbetet si mbeturine e himenit ngambrapa intelektualit kur 9 muajsh i çan cipen mamase me kaptine kur del ne drite te diellit.

Margrit von Braun, vajza e Wernher von Braun, inxhinieri që kish projektuar raketat V-2 të nazistëve qe bombarduan Londren (arma sekrete e Hitlerit), dhe ati i misionit hapsinor të NASA-s:

Nëse babai im do të kish qenë këtu sot, do të ishte i shokuar dhe i zhgënjyer që jo vetëm që nuk jemi kthyer në Hënë prej një kohë të gjatë, por edhe pse nuk kemi arritur ende në Mars, sepse kjo ishte në krye të axhendës së tij.

Kjo eshte nje prej shenjave kryesore qe Amerika deshtuar ne misionin e saj, i cili nuk ishte qe ca handikapate shqiptare te rritur ne nje byth vend te thoshnin: “Amerika eshte si shpirt” duke pare hapsirat e pamate te praterive te saj.

Para tyre, ka shum mundesi baballaret e tyre, ca handikapate te tjere kane thene: “Bashkimi Sovjetik eshte si shpirt” duke pare hapsirat e pamate te stepave ruse.

posts.name: varianti kohor
posts.cooked:
en.m.wikipedia.org

Mammal

Mammals (from Latin mamma "breast") are vertebrate animals constituting the class Mammalia (/məˈmeɪliə/), and characterized by the presence of mammary glands which in females produce milk for feeding (nursing) their young, a neocortex (a region of the brain), fur or hair, and three middle ear bones. These characteristics distinguish them from reptiles and birds, from which they diverged in the late Triassic, 201–227 million years ago. There are around 5,450 species of mammals. qe te marresh pergjigje tamom duhet te konsiderosh se BS dhe USA, dhe fatkeqsisht konflikti midis tyre, kishin nje rol kozmik providencial per te kryer, te fshehur mbas gares se kush fiton ne hapsiren kozmike. posts.name: Daniel
posts.cooked: Mos ja fut kot se sjane ul asnjehere tjeter, pervec 69. Qekan ul 6 here thote. Ku e lexove kte?

Nga sa kam pare ne nje dokumentar jane ulur 4 here,por ndoshta edhe 6 nuk e di.

Por eshte e sigurte qe ka pasur misione te tjera drejt Henes pas atij te 1969-es.

Me duket se misioni i fundit ka qene diku nga viti 1974.

posts.name: Daniel
posts.cooked: misione ka patur, por asnjehere te jete ulur me njeri, pervec asaj te 69 qe thuhet.

Damien Shazelle thote (ne menyre te terthorte, dmth artistikisht) qe Neil Armstrong pranoi te shkoje ne hene sepse donte te vdiste (si te thuash). Pra ishte ne depresion.

Eshte e njejta gje siç thuhet sot (me te drejte): njeriu shkon ne Hene, por Tokes po i ve zjarrin. Pa dyshim, sepse eshte ne depresion

posts.name: Gjembi
posts.cooked:
Nuk punon google andej nga ju?

en.wikipedia.org

Moon landing

  Luna programme (USSR)   Chang'e program (China)   Surveyor program (US)   Apollo program (US)

Po jane ulur or mik se në dokumentar ishin ne interviste personat qe ishin ulur dhe nuk ishte as Armstrong as Aldrin qe u ulen per here te pare.

Ishin te tjere bile por tregonin qe në nje mision kur u kthyen nga Hena paten nje difekt dhe perpjekjet e tyre qe të ktheheshin shendoshe e mire.

Ja ku e ke listen e njerezve qe kane ecur në Hene.
Jane 12 vete.

en.m.wikipedia.org

List of Apollo astronauts | Apollo astronauts who walked on the Moon

Twelve people have walked on the Moon. Four of them are still living as of July 2019.[update] All crewed lunar landings took place between July 1969 and December 1972 as part of the Apollo program. Most astronauts at that time came from the military services and were considered to be on active duty during their NASA service; the few exceptions were considered civilian NASA astronauts (regardless of any prior military service).

Ja prit sa te perhapet islami e tju nxjerre nga depresioni.
Mqrf ke Nil Krahforti, a e pe First Man?
Mos harroj, po High Life?

islami eshte per vete ne depresion

  1. Per First Man po flisja më lart. Me ka pelqy shume
  2. High Life NUK me pelqeu (me gjithe respektin per regjizoren). Shume manierist, dmth formalist ne dhimbje
jena tu prit te na nxjerre nga depresioni Amerika qe eshte si shpirt (i depresionit).

posts.name: Daniel
posts.cooked: Po mir mer mik ti thu kani ik. Ashtu thote dhe amerika. Une skom te drejte qe te dyshoj se nuk kane shkelur asnjehere? Pse si thu ti sdo ikte asnjehere amerika gjate ketyre viteve, sa per te treguar supermacine? Do ishte e pamundur. Gjithsesi ky o mendimi im, qe kam te drejte ta them.
